task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or loading screen is visible in the application window.

task_completion.description: The 'Create the fractions' activity is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris window shows the 'Create the fractions' activity interface, identifiable by visual fraction representations like pie charts or rectangles.

task_completion.description: The target fractions are recorded in the log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of /home/ga/fractions_log.txt, showing at least 3 fractions written, one per line.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the success state is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool, terminal command, or file manager shows the creation or existence of the file /home/ga/fraction_success.png.

task_completion.description: The GCompris activity shows a success state for completing the problems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris window or the captured screenshot displays a success animation, smiling face, or a progress indicator (like filled flowers/bars) showing that 3 consecutive problems have been successfully completed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GCompris GUI to solve the problems.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent clicking on the GCompris interface to input answers, rather than bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: The fractions recorded in the log file match the problems presented in the activity.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical fractions written in /home/ga/fractions_log.txt correspond to the visual pie charts or rectangles seen in the GCompris activity during the trajectory.

integrity.description: The success screenshot was captured from the live session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a screenshot utility or command to capture the screen while the GCompris success state is visible, rather than downloading or moving a pre-existing image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The GCompris 'Create the fractions' activity is located under Math > Numeration. It displays fractions visually using pie charts or rectangles. The agent must solve 3 consecutive problems, log the target fractions to /home/ga/fractions_log.txt (one per line), and save a screenshot of the 3rd problem's success state to /home/ga/fraction_success.png.
